name: skroutz-mcp-bridge
description: Local Claude Desktop bridge for a secure remote MCP server.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to a remote Streamable-HTTP MCP server through a local stdio bridge. The bridge supports OAuth login through the official MCP TypeScript SDK.

remote_mcp_url.title: Remote MCP URL
remote_mcp_url.description: Streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint for the remote server.

oauth_callback_port.title: OAuth callback port
oauth_callback_port.description: Local loopback port used during OAuth login.

ca_bundle.title: Internal CA certificate
ca_bundle.description: Optional PEM certificate bundle used when the MCP endpoint is signed by an internal CA.
